title: 6 du and df Commands for Quick Disk Checks
summary: Spot disk pressure faster with du and df commands for directory size checks, human-readable output, filesystem usage, and quick inode visibility.

test_environment.runtime: du and df available in a POSIX shell

verification_setup: Confirm du and df are installed.
Run the commands inside a local directory or filesystem you can inspect safely.
Use inode checks only on platforms or filesystems that report them meaningfully.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/du_and_df_commands_for_quick_disk_checks.sh in a real local directory.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Run in the local directory or filesystem you want to inspect; results depend on current disk state.
